name: Casing Macron Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Casing Macron Technology Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, markets, and sells computing products. It offers PC chassis and switching power supply products; peripheral devices, such as card readers, mouse, speakers, and barebone systems; and PC cases, including slim, mini tower, middle tower, mini ITX, server, and gamming PC cases. The company also provides water filter systems and temperature drinking water devices. In addition, it offers OEM and ODM services. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
